text: Entering this space, I notice the cool sterility of glass and metal, the architecture's invitation to observation but not yet belonging. The expectation of purpose—signs and symbols of 'R+D' and development—evokes in me both curiosity and slight apprehension. Here, the possibilities of progress hang in the air, but so does a sense of detachment, as if my role is not yet defined. I feel like an outsider, poised to engage, contemplating the interplay of innovation and alienation this environment fosters.
